function.name: WebSearch
function.description: Executes an internet search to retrieve real-time data or external technical documentation.

function.name: ReadFile
function.description: Reads and returns the exact text content of a specified local file.

function.name: WriteFile
function.description: Writes or overwrites text content to a specified local file.

content.description: The exact text or code to write.

function.name: ShellCommand
function.description: Executes a bash shell command in the local terminal. Use this for file manipulation (mkdir, rm, cp, mv), running scripts (python main.py), or installing packages. DO NOT use for destructive system-wide commands.

command.description: The exact bash command to execute.
